fields.Flow: N/A — this plan is **not** keyed to a single UF. It exercises every input surface across the app.
fields.Type: Anomaly coverage — evergreen, re-run nightly. Curated head runs on every PR.
fields.Owner: QA Agent (curated by PM, expanded organically as bugs surface)
fields.Style: Hybrid — **curated cases** (deterministic, must-fire-every-run) + a **Faker-based fuzz harness** (randomized, broad-coverage)

fields.Type: Project QA operating manual — indexes TF / TR / T plans, names test accounts, documents backend deps + teardown + workarounds + triage

items.title: Full QA Coverage Expansion — Candidate scope (not yet committed)
Login & Onboarding

fields.Persona: First-time participant logging in and setting up their account

items.flowGraph:
flowchart TD
    Entry([Entry: App Launch — unauthenticated]) --> Login["Screen: Login"]
    Login -->|"Tap Sign In"| SalesforceAuth["Screen: Salesforce OAuth"]
    SalesforceAuth -->|"Auth success — first login"| Welcome["Screen: Welcome"]
    SalesforceAuth -->|"Auth success — returning user, biometric enabled"| Home["Screen: Home"]
    SalesforceAuth -->|"Auth success — returning user, no biometric"| Home
    SalesforceAuth -->|"Auth failure"| Login

    Welcome --> OnboardingSetup["Modal: Onboarding Setup"]
    OnboardingSetup -->|"Complete profile setup"| NotificationPrompt["Screen: Push Notification Permission"]
    NotificationPrompt -->|"Allow or Skip"| OnboardingComplete["Screen: Onboarding Complete"]
    OnboardingComplete -->|"Tap Get Started"| Home

    Entry2([Entry: App Launch — returning user, biometric enabled]) --> BiometricPrompt["Modal: Biometric Authentication"]
    BiometricPrompt -->|"Success"| Home
    BiometricPrompt -->|"Failure / Cancel"| Login

items.title: Group Browsing & Discussion

fields.Persona: Participant browsing groups and engaging in forum discussion

items.flowGraph:
flowchart TD
    Entry([Entry: Home — tap group card]) --> GroupDetails["Screen: Group Details"]

    GroupDetails -->|"Tap post"| Post["Modal: Post Detail"]
    GroupDetails -->|"Tap New Post"| NewPost["Modal: New Post"]
    GroupDetails -->|"Tap Media tab"| MediaGallery["Screen: Media Gallery"]
    GroupDetails -->|"Tap Members"| MemberList["Screen: Group Members"]
    GroupDetails -->|"Tap Program Info"| GroupDetails

    Post -->|"Tap Reply"| Post
    Post -->|"Tap Like"| Post
    Post -->|"Tap Liked By count"| LikedByModal["Modal: Liked By"]
    Post -->|"Long press post/reply"| ContextMenu["Popover: Context Menu"]
    LikedByModal -->|"Dismiss"| Post

    ContextMenu -->|"Edit (own content)"| EditPost["Modal: Edit Post"]
    ContextMenu -->|"Delete (own content)"| DeleteConfirm["Modal: Delete Confirmation"]
    ContextMenu -->|"Report"| ReportConfirm["Modal: Report Abuse"]
    ContextMenu -->|"Cancel"| Post

    EditPost -->|"Save"| Post
    EditPost -->|"Cancel"| Post
    DeleteConfirm -->|"Confirm"| GroupDetails
    DeleteConfirm -->|"Cancel"| Post
    ReportConfirm -->|"Submit"| Post
    ReportConfirm -->|"Cancel"| Post

    NewPost -->|"Post — success"| GroupDetails
    NewPost -->|"Cancel"| GroupDetails

    MediaGallery -->|"Tap image"| FullScreenImage["Modal: Full Screen Image"]
    FullScreenImage -->|"Dismiss"| MediaGallery

    GroupDetails -->|"Tap external link"| Browser["Screen: Browser"]
    Browser -->|"Back"| GroupDetails

items.title: Profile Management

fields.Persona: Participant viewing and editing their profile

items.flowGraph:
flowchart TD
    Entry([Entry: Home — tap profile icon]) --> Profile["Screen: Profile"]

    Profile -->|"Tap Edit Profile"| EditProfile["Screen: Edit Profile"]
    Profile -->|"Tap Hobbies"| EditHobbies["Modal: Edit Hobbies"]
    Profile -->|"Tap Settings"| Settings["Screen: Settings"]

    EditProfile -->|"Tap Avatar"| AvatarPicker["Overlay: Image Picker"]
    AvatarPicker -->|"Select photo"| EditProfile
    AvatarPicker -->|"Cancel"| EditProfile
    EditProfile -->|"Save"| Profile
    EditProfile -->|"Back"| Profile

    EditHobbies -->|"Save"| Profile
    EditHobbies -->|"Cancel"| Profile

items.title: Group Leader Management

fields.Persona: Group leader finding and joining their assigned trip groups

items.flowGraph:
flowchart TD
    Entry([Entry: Home — tap Group Leader]) --> LeaderTrips["Screen: Group Leader Trips"]

    LeaderTrips -->|"Tap Join Group"| JoinGroup["Screen: Join Group"]
    LeaderTrips -->|"Tap group"| GroupDetails["Screen: Group Details"]

    JoinGroup -->|"Enter program number — search"| JoinGroup
    JoinGroup -->|"Tap Join on result"| GroupDetails
    JoinGroup -->|"Back"| LeaderTrips

items.title: Offline & Reliability

fields.Persona: Participant on a trip with intermittent or absent connectivity (national park, international destination, motorcoach in transit)

items.flowGraph:
flowchart TD
    Online([State: Online — normal app use]) -->|"Network drops (NetInfo callback)"| OfflineBanner["Overlay: NoInternetNotifier"]
    Online -->|"App force-closed, relaunched while offline"| ColdOffline["State: Cold start, no network"]

    ColdOffline --> ReadCache["Fragment: Cached groups, threads, photos"]
    ReadCache -.->|"redux-persist rehydrates whitelisted slices"| OfflineBanner

    OfflineBanner --> ReadCache
    ReadCache -->|"Tap a like"| OptimisticLike["Fragment: Like count updates immediately"]
    OptimisticLike -.->|"enqueueLikeMutation()"| Queue["State: offlineQueue.likeMutations"]
    Queue -.->|"Same thread, opposite action"| Queue

    ReadCache -->|"Try to compose a post"| PostFails["Overlay: NoInternetFailedPostBanner"]
    PostFails -.->|"Post not queued — see Do Not Do on S-007-002"| ReadCache

    ReadCache -->|"Try to comment"| CommentBlocked["Fragment: Comment input disabled"]
    ReadCache -->|"Try to play a video"| VideoPlaceholder["Fragment: Video placeholder / error state"]

    OfflineBanner -->|"Network returns (NetInfo callback)"| Reconnect["State: Reconnecting"]
    Reconnect -->|"401 on next call → refresh token"| TokenRefresh["Fragment: Silent token refresh"]
    Reconnect -->|"No 401"| ProcessQueue["Fragment: Process likeMutations queue"]
    TokenRefresh --> ProcessQueue
    ProcessQueue -->|"Tag invalidation refreshes cached data"| Online
    ProcessQueue -.->|"Per-item failure stays in queue, retried next reconnect"| Queue

    OfflineBanner -->|"Launch while build < requiredVersion (independent of offline state)"| ForcedUpdate["Modal: Required Update Alert"]
    ForcedUpdate -->|"OK"| Store([Exit: App Store / Play Store])

items.title: QA Login Regression — Implement & Execute TF-001

fields.Persona: QA agent implementing and executing the login flow regression suite

items.flowGraph:
flowchart TD
    Entry([Entry: S-009-003 picked up — Status: In Progress]) --> PrereqCheck["Screen: Prerequisite Verification"]

    PrereqCheck -->|"S-009-001 Done + S-009-002 Done"| PlanReview["Screen: TF-001 Plan Review"]
    PrereqCheck -->|"Missing prerequisite"| EXT_Blocked([Exit: Blocked — return to Backlog])

    PlanReview -->|"Journey A + B scope confirmed"| TestIDAudit["Screen: testID Gap Audit"]

    TestIDAudit -->|"Gaps found on Login / Welcome / Onboarding screens"| TestIDFix["Screen: testID Gap Fill"]
    TestIDAudit -->|"No gaps"| AuthorA

    TestIDFix --> AuthorA["Screen: Journey A Maestro Authoring"]

    AuthorA -->|"journey-a-full-onboard.yaml written"| AuthorB["Screen: Journey B Maestro Authoring"]

    AuthorB -->|"journey-b-minimal-onboard.yaml written"| IndexCreate["Fragment: Create index.yaml"]

    IndexCreate -->|"index.yaml wires A + B"| RunAndroid["Screen: Local Run — Android Emulator"]

    RunAndroid -->|"Both journeys pass"| RunIOS["Screen: Local Run — iOS Simulator"]
    RunAndroid -->|"Failure"| Triage["Screen: Failure Triage"]

    RunIOS -->|"Both journeys pass"| EvidenceCheck["Screen: Evidence Verification"]
    RunIOS -->|"iOS-specific failure"| PlatformSplit["Screen: Platform-Specific YAML Split"]

    PlatformSplit -->|"Platform file authored"| RunIOS

    Triage -->|"Flow YAML fix"| AuthorA
    Triage -->|"testID fix"| TestIDFix
    Triage -->|"App bug discovered"| EXT_Bug([Exit: File BUG-NNN + return to Triage])

    EvidenceCheck -->|"Every ✓ Verify checkpoint has a screenshot"| RunLog["Fragment: Append TF-001 Run Log"]
    EvidenceCheck -->|"Missing checkpoint evidence"| AuthorA

    RunLog --> CIPush["Screen: CI Integration — Bitrise PR Check"]

    CIPush -->|"PR check green"| Complete([Exit: S-009-003 Done])
    CIPush -->|"PR check red"| SlackAlert["Fragment: Slack Failure Alert"]

    SlackAlert --> Triage
